innateAbility.name: Boomstick
innateAbility.description: The closer Snapfire is to the damaged enemy units, the greater the outgoing damage amplification granted.

abilities.name: Scatterblast
abilities.description: Unloads a blast that damages and applies a movement speed slow to enemy units within a cone. The blast is more effective at point-blank distance.

abilities.name: Firesnap Cookie
abilities.description: Beatrix feeds a potent cookie to an allied unit, causing it to hop a short distance.The affected unit stuns and damages enemy units within the landing radius.

abilities.name: Lil' Shredder
abilities.description: Heats up her mounted turret to rapidly fire a number of fixed-damage attacks while applying an armor reduction to the affected enemy unit.Grants self bonus attack range for the duration.

abilities.name: Gobble Up
abilities.description: Mortimer gobbles up an allied unit, which he can then spit toward enemy units.The unit stays in his belly for a fixed duration, and is released after the max duration if Spit Out is not cast.

abilities.name: Spit Out
abilities.description: Mortimer spits out the unit within his belly along with a glob of highly flammable firespit.

abilities.name: Mortimer Kisses
abilities.description: Mortimer launches a barrage of firespit globs over time while reducing Snapfire's turn rate for the duration.
